title: stipa tianschanica var. pubescens
intro: Stipa tianschanica var. pubescens, also known as the hairy Stipa, is a type of grass belonging to the Poaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving coughs, and soothing digestive issues, due to its saponins, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds. In terms of herbal preparations, Stipa tianschanica var. pubescens is often made into tea, decoctions, or infusions, and may also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
